---
title: "__init__.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/games/odin_protocol/engine/__init__.py"
loc: 24
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.25
style_score: 3.53
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.86
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating internal logic. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 2 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
Internal logic only.
